items.claim: Abdul Hussein demonstrates high-level grappling ability by out-grappling a high-level fighter.
items.quote: you're out grappling a super highle fighter... that speaks volumes to the skill level that Abdul brings to the table.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein's primary strengths are landing big shots on the feet and taking the fight to the floor.
items.quote: his bread and butter is landing the big shots on the feet, getting the fight to the floor

items.claim: Cody Gibson is nearly 39 years of age with a record of 21 and 12.
items.quote: Cody Gibson's almost 39 years of age, you know, he's 21 and 12

items.claim: Cody Gibson was brutally starched early in the first round by Richie Loung roughly eight months ago.
items.quote: getting brutally starched early in the fight by a Richie Long um in in the very first round eight months ago.

items.claim: Cody Gibson will have the height and reach advantage in this matchup.
items.quote: Gibson's going to be the longer rangier guy.

items.claim: Cody Gibson lacks the remaining skills and miles left on him to deal with a young, dangerous fighter like Abdul Hussein.
items.quote: I just don't know that Cody Gibson has the skills at this point and and the miles left on him to be able to deal with a super young dangerous guy in Abdul Hussein.
